TaskDefinition.name: Ascension Joiner OIM Task - AMITA
TaskDefinition.Description: Task for updating file for OIM Data for AMITA Users

Argument.name: deltaRecordsCount
Argument.Prompt: Total number of records in Delta File

Argument.name: identitiesFromEventsCount
Argument.Prompt: Number of identities in User ID and Email Changes List

Argument.name: processedIdentitiesFromIdentitiesChangedList
Argument.Prompt: Identities processed from the User ID and Email Changes List

Argument.name: unprocessedIdentitiesFromIdentitiesChangedList
Argument.Prompt: Unprocessed Identities from the User ID and Email Changes List

Argument.name: identitiesPendingDateThreshold
Argument.Prompt: Identities pending date threshold to provision in the User ID and Email Changes List

Argument.name: identitiesTobeReviewed
Argument.Prompt: Identities requiring provisioning review in the User ID and Email Changes List

Argument.name: identitiesRemovedFromIdentitiesChangedList
Argument.Prompt: Identities removed from the User ID and Email Changes List

Argument.name: outputFileRecordsCount
Argument.Prompt: Number of records sent in the Output File
